mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-2R2 — Immutable Input Determinism Repair

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, hashlib, json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
drop=root/r"AGENT_FOX_V1A2R2"
installed=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks=[
    (drop/r"static_code_launcher_bridge_v1r2.py", installed/r"static_code_launcher_bridge_v1r2.py", "775edcfa3afc122e91aaabef95feb7a90a0e31d1e772bd46ab04343db18c1a42"),
    (drop/r"STATIC_CODE_LAUNCHER_CONTRACT_V1R2.json", installed/r"STATIC_CODE_LAUNCHER_CONTRACT_V1R2.json", "ab3e5ef12efcb44916f454f972e4f35d1ac7b4c0853d83219d9dfd872b1da236"),
    (drop/r"README_V1A2R2.md", installed/r"README_V1A2R2.md", "89f2543e5e3196f4cfac16708a4fafe99a1c13b703daffbed5eb8e62221926d0"),
]
for source,target,expected in checks:
    assert source.is_file(), f"missing package file: {source}"
    assert target.is_file(), f"missing installed file: {target}"
    assert hashlib.sha256(source.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected, f"package hash mismatch: {source}"
    assert hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected, f"installed hash mismatch: {target}"
script_path=installed/r"static_code_launcher_bridge_v1r2.py"
script=script_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script,str(script_path),"exec")
tree=ast.parse(script)
imports=set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node,ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split('.')[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node,ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split('.')[0])
forbidden={"subprocess","socket","urllib","http","ftplib","requests","pip","ensurepip","psutil","winreg","ctypes","webbrowser","importlib","os","shutil"}
bad=sorted(imports & forbidden)
assert not bad, "forbidden imports: "+", ".join(bad)
for marker in ("subprocess.run(","subprocess.Popen(","os.system(","shell=True","urlopen(","socket.socket(","pip install","Path.unlink(","shutil.rmtree(","os.remove(","os.rename(","importlib.import_module(","__import__("):
    assert marker not in script, "forbidden operation marker: "+marker
contract=json.loads((installed/r"STATIC_CODE_LAUNCHER_CONTRACT_V1R2.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract.get("schema")=="foxai.agent_fox.technical_core.v1a2r2.immutable_static_bridge_contract.v1"
safety=contract.get("safety",{})
for key in ("network_required","third_party_dependencies_required","subprocess_launches","launcher_execution","python_interpreter_probes","foxai_imports_or_execution","models_loaded","elevation","deletion_or_renaming","existing_foxai_source_modified","raw_source_content_persisted"):
    assert safety.get(key) is False, (key,safety.get(key))
policy=contract.get("determinism_policy",{})
assert policy.get("internal_build_count")==2
assert policy.get("same_immutable_capture_for_both_builds") is True
assert policy.get("live_tree_reread_for_second_build") is False
assert policy.get("byte_for_byte_core_and_shard_comparison") is True
assert policy.get("live_drift_reported_separately") is True
prior=root/r"System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-053749-E3BE2A_V1A2_STATIC_BRIDGE"
prior_receipt=json.loads((prior/r"STATIC_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert prior_receipt.get("result")=="static_code_and_launcher_bridge_complete"
assert prior_receipt.get("mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-053749-E3BE2A"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A2R2_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1A-2R2 payloads, syntax, standard-library safety, immutable-capture contract, and V1A-2 prerequisite
Run in-memory launcher precision, capture, URL, redaction, and deterministic parser self-tests
Capture authorized inputs once and internally build and compare two deterministic core-and-shard outputs
Run built-in output, immutable determinism, protected drift, hash, shard, count, and false-edge validator

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
out=root/r"System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-063725-BFCAB9_V1A2R2_IMMUTABLE_BRIDGE"
launch=json.loads((out/r"REFINED_STATIC_LAUNCHER_INDEX.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert launch.get("source_launcher_record_count")==536
assert launch.get("record_count")==536
assert launch.get("immutable_input_capture_used") is True
assert launch.get("launchers_executed") is False
assert launch.get("confirmed_active_or_executed_targets")==0
metrics=launch.get("false_edge_metrics",{})
for key in ("shell_builtin_launch_edge_count","url_as_filesystem_edge_count","comment_launch_edge_count","unresolved_confirmed_target_count"):
    assert metrics.get(key)==0, (key,metrics.get(key),metrics.get("samples"))
records={str(item.get("relative_path","")).replace('/','\\').casefold():item for item in launch.get("records",[])}
def record(name):
    key=name.replace('/','\\').casefold()
    assert key in records, f"missing known launcher: {name}"
    item=records[key]
    assert item.get("parse_status")=="refined_static_parsed", (name,item.get("parse_status"),item.get("error"))
    assert item.get("launcher_executed") is False
    return item
def values(item,kind):
    if kind=="interpreters": return [str(x.get("interpreter",{}).get("expanded_value","")).replace('/','\\').casefold() for x in item.get("interpreter_invocations",[])]
    if kind=="scripts": return [str((x.get("script") or {}).get("expanded_value","")).replace('/','\\').casefold() for x in item.get("interpreter_invocations",[]) if x.get("script")]
    if kind=="launchers": return [str(x.get("expanded_value","")).replace('/','\\').casefold() for x in item.get("called_launchers",[])]
    raise AssertionError(kind)
def require_suffix(item,kind,suffix):
    wanted=suffix.replace('/','\\').casefold()
    available=values(item,kind)
    assert any(value.endswith(wanted) for value in available), (item.get("relative_path"),kind,wanted,available)
def require_root(item):
    variables={str(k).casefold():str(v).replace('/','\\') for k,v in item.get("variables",{}).items()}
    assert variables.get("foxai_root","").casefold()==r"Z:\FOXAI".casefold(), (item.get("relative_path"),variables)
workshop=record("Launch FOXAI Workshop.bat")
require_root(workshop)
require_suffix(workshop,"interpreters",r"Runtime\Desktop\python\python.exe")
require_suffix(workshop,"scripts",r"System\PortableRuntime\manage_comfyui_normal.py")
portable=record("START_FOXAI_WEB_PORTABLE.bat")
require_suffix(portable,"interpreters",r"env\python\python.exe")
require_suffix(portable,"scripts",r"core\foxai_web.py")
web=record("START_FOXAI_WEB_WITH_COMFYUI.bat")
require_root(web)
require_suffix(web,"interpreters",r"Runtime\Desktop\python\python.exe")
require_suffix(web,"scripts",r"System\PortableRuntime\start_comfyui_quiet.py")
require_suffix(web,"launchers",r"START_FOXAI_WEB_PORTABLE.bat")
assert 8765 in web.get("ports",[])
assert any(str(x.get("url","")).casefold()=="http://127.0.0.1:8765" for x in web.get("urls",[])), web.get("urls")
desktop=record("START_FOXAI_DESKTOP_TWO_WINDOW_RECOVERY.bat")
require_root(desktop)
require_suffix(desktop,"interpreters",r"Runtime\Desktop\python\python.exe")
require_suffix(desktop,"interpreters",r"Runtime\Desktop\python\pythonw.exe")
require_suffix(desktop,"scripts",r"System\PortableRuntime\start_comfyui_quiet.py")
require_suffix(desktop,"scripts",r"foxai.py")
for item in launch.get("records",[]):
    for edge in item.get("edges",[]):
        assert edge.get("confirmed_active_or_executed") is False
        assert edge.get("classification")!="url"
        if edge.get("unresolved_variables"):
            assert edge.get("confirmation")!="static_existing_target"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A2R2_KNOWN_LAUNCHER_TRACES_VERIFIED")
validations.name: Verify precise static traces for the four known-good FOXAI launchers

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
out=root/r"System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-063725-BFCAB9_V1A2R2_IMMUTABLE_BRIDGE"
d=json.loads((out/r"IMMUTABLE_DETERMINISM_REPORT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert d.get("comparison_kind")=="two_internal_builds_from_one_immutable_capture"
assert d.get("byte_for_byte_match") is True
assert d.get("live_tree_reread_for_second_build") is False
assert d.get("compared_output_count")==len(d.get("compared_outputs",[]))
assert d.get("compared_output_count",0)>=70, d.get("compared_output_count")
manifest=json.loads((out/r"INPUT_CAPTURE_MANIFEST.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert manifest.get("capture_kind")=="single_read_immutable_in_memory"
assert manifest.get("raw_source_content_persisted") is False
assert manifest.get("record_count")==len(manifest.get("records",[]))
assert manifest.get("record_count",0)>=565
assert all("_bytes" not in item and "_native_path" not in item for item in manifest.get("records",[]))
drift=json.loads((out/r"LIVE_DRIFT_REPORT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert drift.get("ordinary_or_mutable_drift_is_parser_nondeterminism") is False
assert drift.get("protected_change_count")==0, drift.get("protected_changes")
assert drift.get("record_count")==len(drift.get("records",[]))
receipt=json.loads((out/r"REFINED_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert receipt.get("immutable_internal_double_build_match") is True
assert receipt.get("live_tree_reread_for_second_build") is False
assert receipt.get("protected_change_count")==0
assert receipt.get("input_capture_record_count")==manifest.get("record_count")
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A2R2_IMMUTABLE_DETERMINISM_AND_DRIFT_VERIFIED")
validations.name: Verify one-capture double-build determinism and separately classified live drift

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib, json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
out=root/r"System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-063725-BFCAB9_V1A2R2_IMMUTABLE_BRIDGE"
required={"STATIC_CODE_INDEX.json","REFINED_STATIC_LAUNCHER_INDEX.json","STATIC_REFERENCE_CATALOG.json","KNOWN_GOOD_COMPARISON.json","REFINED_INDEX_COVERAGE.json","INPUT_CAPTURE_MANIFEST.json","IMMUTABLE_DETERMINISM_REPORT.json","LIVE_DRIFT_REPORT.json","REFINED_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json","QUERY_EXAMPLES.md"}
actual={p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()}
assert required.issubset(actual), f"missing outputs: {sorted(required-actual)}"
receipt=json.loads((out/r"REFINED_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert receipt.get("result")=="immutable_input_determinism_repair_complete"
assert receipt.get("mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-063725-BFCAB9"
for key in ("network_used","packages_installed","foxai_source_imported_or_executed","launchers_executed","python_interpreters_probed","models_loaded","existing_foxai_source_modified","global_line_record_ceiling_used","live_tree_reread_for_second_build"):
    assert receipt.get(key) is False, (key,receipt.get(key))
assert receipt.get("source_v1a2_outputs_verified") is True
assert receipt.get("known_good_candidates_all_match") is True
assert receipt.get("immutable_input_capture_used") is True
assert receipt.get("immutable_internal_double_build_match") is True
assert receipt.get("protected_change_count")==0
for key in ("shell_builtin_launch_edge_count","url_as_filesystem_edge_count","comment_launch_edge_count","unresolved_confirmed_target_count"):
    assert receipt.get(key)==0, (key,receipt.get(key))
for item in receipt.get("core_outputs_before_receipt",[]):
    path=out/Path(item["name"])
    assert path.is_file(), f"receipt output missing: {path}"
    assert path.stat().st_size==item["size_bytes"], f"output size mismatch: {path}"
    assert hashlib.sha256(path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==item["sha256"], f"output hash mismatch: {path}"
code=json.loads((out/r"STATIC_CODE_INDEX.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert code.get("file_count")==565
catalog=json.loads((out/r"STATIC_REFERENCE_CATALOG.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert catalog.get("immutable_input_capture_used") is True
assert catalog.get("global_line_record_ceiling_used") is False
assert catalog.get("source_file_coverage_count")==565
assert len(catalog.get("source_file_coverage",[]))==565
assert catalog.get("shard_count")==len(catalog.get("shards",[]))
assert catalog.get("shard_count",0)>0
assert sum(int(x.get("record_count",0)) for x in catalog.get("shards",[]))==catalog.get("line_record_count")
for shard in catalog.get("shards",[]):
    path=out/Path(shard["name"])
    assert path.is_file(), path
    assert path.stat().st_size==shard["size_bytes"]
    assert hashlib.sha256(path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==shard["sha256"]
coverage=json.loads((out/r"REFINED_INDEX_COVERAGE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert coverage.get("global_line_record_ceiling_used") is False
assert coverage.get("source_files_from_v1a2")==565
status=coverage.get("current_source_hash_status",{})
assert sum(int(v) for v in status.values())==565, status
known=json.loads((out/r"KNOWN_GOOD_COMPARISON.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert known.get("record_count")==6
assert known.get("all_match") is True
assert all(item.get("status")=="match" for item in known.get("records",[]))
prior=root/r"System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-053749-E3BE2A_V1A2_STATIC_BRIDGE"
prior_receipt=json.loads((prior/r"STATIC_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
for item in prior_receipt.get("core_outputs_before_receipt",[]):
    path=prior/item["name"]
    assert path.is_file(), f"V1A-2 prerequisite missing: {path}"
    assert path.stat().st_size==item["size_bytes"]
    assert hashlib.sha256(path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==item["sha256"], f"V1A-2 prerequisite changed: {path}"
installed=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
for name,expected in {"static_code_launcher_bridge_v1r2.py": "775edcfa3afc122e91aaabef95feb7a90a0e31d1e772bd46ab04343db18c1a42", "STATIC_CODE_LAUNCHER_CONTRACT_V1R2.json": "ab3e5ef12efcb44916f454f972e4f35d1ac7b4c0853d83219d9dfd872b1da236", "README_V1A2R2.md": "89f2543e5e3196f4cfac16708a4fafe99a1c13b703daffbed5eb8e62221926d0"}.items():
    path=installed/name
    assert path.is_file() and hashlib.sha256(path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected, f"installed payload changed: {path}"
total=sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.rglob('*') if p.is_file())
assert total<=128*1024*1024, f"output ceiling exceeded: {total}"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A2R2_COMPLETE_OUTPUTS_VERIFIED")
validations.name: Verify complete output hashes, shard accounting, protected candidates, V1A-2 prerequisites, payloads, counts, and 128 MiB ceiling
